programName: Private Lead Service Line Replacement Program
subsidyType: five-year city lead service line replacement program funded on an annual basis
publicSideCovered: yes utility-owned portions are replaced as part of the city program
privateSideCovered: yes most invited homeowners can have their lead service lines replaced for free
propertyRules: properties identified through annual notices or city replacement outreach are eligible for invitations
contractorRules: city crews and contractors coordinate the replacement work and restoration
